programme.title: James Martin's French Adventure
programme.desc: The chef visits the Languedoc region, famous for its wine and the hearty, meaty dish cassoulet, and stops at a roadside fruit stall owned by a couple of British expats, before creating an unusual dish using melon and onion rings. He also wanders round a museum dedicated to Citroen 2CVs and cooks a steak on a barbecue in the blazing sunshine(n)

programme.title: Who's Doing the Dishes?
programme.desc: Former royal butler Paul Burrell puts on a dinner party for four strangers, who have to work out the identity of their mystery celebrity host with the help of a few cryptic clues - otherwise they will be doing the washing up. Hosted by Brian McFadden(n)

programme.title: ITV Racing Live
programme.desc: Ed Chamberlin presents coverage of day four of the St Leger Festival, including the 3.35 William Hill St Leger Stakes, which follows races at 1.50, 2.25 and 3.00. Plus, a race from 2.05 at Chester, and 2.45 at Chelmsford. With analysis from Jason Weaver and Kevin Blake, reports by Luke Harvey, Mick Fitzgerald, Oli Bell and Matt Chapman, and commentary from Richard Hoiles(n)

programme.title: Tipping Point
programme.desc: Game show, hosted by Ben Shephard, in which contestants answer questions to win turns on an arcade-style machine. Dropping tokens down a choice of four chutes, they hope to knock piles of them off a moving shelf - and the more they collect, the greater the prize fund. The player who has won the least amount is then eliminated, and the last one standing competes for a £10,000 jackpot(n)

programme.title: You've Been Framed!
programme.desc: Harry Hill narrates another bunch of domestic mishaps, captured in video form by viewers. This time, a Brexit victory dance ends in disaster, a runaway car demolishes a wall, and a dog eats Lady Gaga(n)

programme.title: Catchphrase
programme.desc: Stephen Mulhern hosts the game show, asking contestants Michael, Erin, and Stewart to 'see it and say it' as they try to guess the familiar phrases hidden in animated clues. After the first elimination, the two remaining players battle to reach the Super Catchphrase round, where one of them could win £50,000(n)

programme.title: The Chase Celebrity Special
programme.desc: Bradley Walsh presents as celebrity contestants Russell Kane, Leonie Elliott, Kevin Clifton and Bonnie Langford pit their wits against ruthless quiz genius the Chaser in the hope of winning a potential prize pot worth thousands of pounds for charity. They must work as a team and play strategically to answer general knowledge questions against the clock and race down the game board to the exit without being caught(n)

programme.title: Britain's Got Talent: The Champions
programme.desc: Ant and Dec welcome more champions of past series back to the stage, along with winners from overseas variants of the show. This week's visitors include a death-defying performance from Alexandr Magala, whose sword-swallowing skills made him a worthy winner of Russia's Got Talent. Among the old favourites putting in a return appearance are series four dancers Twist and Pulse and Collabro, the musical theatre singing group who were crowned champions of series eight. Simon Cowell, Amanda Holden, Alesha Dixon and David Walliams are on hand to pass judgement on the acts(n)

programme.title: The Jonathan Ross Show
programme.desc: The host is joined for the launch of a new series by Downton Abbey stars Elizabeth McGovern and Michelle Dockery, who discuss reviving the period drama for a new movie. Other guests include Stephen Fry, Craig David and Martin Freeman, currently starring in true-life crime drama A Confession. Plus, Charli XCX and Christine and The Queens perform together in the studio(n)

programme.title: Play to the Whistle

programme.title: A Confession
programme.desc: The hunt for Sian O'Callaghan continues as Det Supt Steve Fulcher and his team see suspects come and go with no leads to follow. Local woman Karen Edwards notices that she only lives a few doors away from the missing girl's mother, Elaine Pickford, but is only reminded of her own problems, having not seen her daughter Becky for several years. With things looking bleak for Wiltshire police, a brilliant piece of police work finally points Fulcher towards a definite suspect. Fact-based crime drama, starring Martin Freeman(n)

The Carribean tour concludes at the famous sunset party at Shirley Heights, where he prepares one last cocktail recipe(n)

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: A book dealer is found drowned, having seemingly committed suicide in despair at having sunk all his cash in a local inventor's revolutionary new transport system - but the discovery of a second body makes it clear that there is a murderer at large. Detective drama, starring John Nettles, Daniel Casey, Kate Buffery and Richard Todd(n)

programme.title: Britain's Got Talent: The Champions
programme.desc: Ant and Dec welcome more champions of past series back to the stage, along with winners from overseas variants of the show. Among the old favourites putting in a return appearance are series four dancers Twist and Pulse and Collabro, the musical theatre singing group who were crowned champions of series eight. Simon Cowell, Amanda Holden, Alesha Dixon and David Walliams are on hand to pass judgement on the acts(n)

programme.title: Goodwood Revival Live
programme.desc: The greatest cars from the golden age of motorsport are raced by legendary drivers and celebrity enthusiasts at the historic Goodwood Revival. The iconic track goes back in time to the 1940s, 50s and 60s, as more than 150,000 fans adorn period fashion and enjoy the circuit exactly as it was in its heyday(n)

programme.title: Paul O'Grady's Little Heroes
programme.desc: Paul returns to meet more children who are receiving life-changing treatment at Great Ormond Street Hospital in London, including five-year-old chatterbox Daniel, who has been confined to a wheelchair for two weeks after being struck down out of the blue by juvenile idiopathic arthritis. Paul also speaks to 14-year-old Reagan, who has scoliosis, a progressive condition that has left her with an ever-increasing curvature in her spine, and 17-year-old Gavriel, who has Duchenne muscular dystrophy(n)

programme.title: The Chase
programme.desc: Bradley Walsh presents as four contestants pit their wits against ruthless quiz genius the Chaser in the hope of winning a potential prize pot worth thousands of pounds. Dropping tokens down a choice of four chutes, they hope to knock piles of them off a moving shelf - and the more they collect, the better their chances of collecting the £20,000 prize for their selected charity(n)

programme.title: 5 Gold Rings

programme.title: Who Wants to Be a Millionaire?
programme.desc: Jeremy Clarkson hosts the big-prize quiz in which another line-up of contestants answer questions that could change their lives - with the lifelines Ask the Audience, Phone a Friend, 50-50 and Ask the Host available to them if they get stuck(n)

programme.title: Sanditon
programme.desc: The arrival of Miss Lambe's forbidden love causes Charlotte to question her opinion of Sidney. Clara witnesses a moment between Esther and Sir Edward that raises her suspicions about their relationship, with devastating consequences for Esther. Period drama, starring Rose Williams and Theo James(n)

programme.title: Billy Connolly's Great American Trail
programme.desc: Billy visits Kearny, New Jersey, where he discovers it was the Scots who brought football to America. He then embarks on a pilgrimage to the Martin Guitar Company - the factory that has built guitars for some of the biggest rock stars on the planet, including Billy's hero Hank Williams. He also ventures to the Eastern State Penitentiary, which was once America's most notorious prison and the one-time residence of legendary gangster Al Capone(n)

programme.title: Australia with Julia Bradbury
programme.desc: Presenter Julia Bradbury travels 12,000km as she explores all four corners of Australia, finding out about the continent and the people who live there. She begins in Sydney, exploring the harbour and heading backstage at the famous opera house. At Bondi Beach she joins a shoreline patrol and visits a tattoo parlour, before she joins the local drag queens for a memorable night(n)

programme.desc: Bernie and Kel's reunion provokes hostility from Paul, and Sinead drags Daniel to visit a hospice. Meanwhile, Robert leaves Ryan to supervise Ali's recovery(n)

programme.title: The Cameron Interview
programme.desc: It has been three years since David Cameron stepped down as Prime Minister of the United Kingdom, following the country's momentous vote to leave the European Union. Now, in his first in-depth television interview about his time in office, David Cameron talks to Tom Bradby about the highs and lows of his premiership, along with his thoughts on the 2016 referendum and its consequences for the UK(n)

programme.title: Coronation Street
programme.desc: Billy asks questions about Paul's past, and Ali fails to hide his struggles from Toyah. Elsewhere, Aggie defies Ed and plans a surprise party behind his back(n)

programme.title: A Confession
programme.desc: Detective Superintendent Steve Fulcher takes chief suspect Christopher Halliwell to a remote location in the Wiltshire countryside to question him about the whereabouts of missing Swindon girl, Sian O'Callaghan. When Fulcher manages to gain Halliwell's trust, events take a turn that will change the lives of both men for ever, as Halliwell confesses to killing Sian along with a prostitute he murdered and buried in a field many years earlier. Drama, starring Martin Freeman, Joe Absolom and Siobhan Finneran(n)

programme.title: Serial Killer with Piers Morgan
programme.desc: The broadcaster meets Mark Riebe, who was convicted for one murder but has confessed multiple times to the abduction and killing of 13 women along Florida's Gulf Coast. Although Riebe has since withdrawn his confessions, police believe he is one of the worst serial killers in Florida's history. Piers uses Riebe's video and audio confessions, news archive and testimony to explore what sort of man would commit murder and then taunt the victims' families for nearly 20 years(n)

programme.title: Deep Water
programme.desc: Traumatised from the attack, Roz makes her way home and finds a furious Joanne waiting for her. With no one else to confide in, Roz decides to tell Scott about Wayne, who promises to retrieve the footage. Meanwhile, Lisa finds Joe in a local bar and watches as he drinks and flirts with the barmaid. When she awakes the next morning and realises he has not come home, she fears the worst. With her daughter's return, Kate struggles to keep her web of lies intact. Starring Anna Friel, Sinead Keenan, Steven Cree and Gerald Kyd(n)

Dropping tokens down a choice of four chutes, they hope to knock piles of them off a moving shelf - and the more they collect, the greater the prize fund. The player who has won the least amount is then eliminated, and the last one standing competes for a £10,000 jackpot(n)

programme.title: You've Been Framed!
programme.desc: Harry Hill narrates another bunch of domestic mishaps, captured in video form by viewers. This time, a Brexit victory dance ends in disaster, a runaway car demolishes a wall, and a dog eats Lady Gaga(n)

programme.title: Catchphrase
programme.desc: Stephen Mulhern hosts the game show, asking contestants Michael, Erin, and Stewart to 'see it and say it' as they try to guess the familiar phrases hidden in animated clues. After the first elimination, the two remaining players battle to reach the Super Catchphrase round, where one of them could win £50,000(n)

programme.title: The Chase Celebrity Special
programme.desc: Bradley Walsh presents as celebrity contestants Russell Kane, Leonie Elliott, Kevin Clifton and Bonnie Langford pit their wits against ruthless quiz genius the Chaser in the hope of winning a potential prize pot worth thousands of pounds for charity. They must work as a team and play strategically to answer general knowledge questions against the clock and race down the game board to the exit without being caught(n)

programme.title: Britain's Got Talent: The Champions
programme.desc: Ant and Dec welcome more champions of past series back to the stage, along with winners from overseas variants of the show. This week's visitors include a death-defying performance from Alexandr Magala, whose sword-swallowing skills made him a worthy winner of Russia's Got Talent. Among the old favourites putting in a return appearance are series four dancers Twist and Pulse and Collabro, the musical theatre singing group who were crowned champions of series eight. Simon Cowell, Amanda Holden, Alesha Dixon and David Walliams are on hand to pass judgement on the acts(n)

programme.title: The Jonathan Ross Show
programme.desc: The host is joined for the launch of a new series by Downton Abbey stars Elizabeth McGovern and Michelle Dockery, who discuss reviving the period drama for a new movie. Other guests include Stephen Fry, Craig David and Martin Freeman, currently starring in true-life crime drama A Confession. Plus, Charli XCX and Christine and The Queens perform together in the studio(n)

programme.title: Play to the Whistle
programme.desc: Holly Willoughby hosts the sports-based comedy panel show. Talk show host Jonathan Ross, football pundit Chris Kamara and Coronation Street's Jack P Shepherd (David Platt) join team captains Frank Lampard and Bradley Walsh this week, with regular panellists Romesh Ranganathan and Seann Walsh also on hand to provide the laughs(n)

programme.title: A Confession
programme.desc: The hunt for Sian O'Callaghan continues as Det Supt Steve Fulcher and his team see suspects come and go with no leads to follow. Local woman Karen Edwards notices that she only lives a few doors away from the missing girl's mother, Elaine Pickford, but is only reminded of her own problems, having not seen her daughter Becky for several years. With things looking bleak for Wiltshire police, a brilliant piece of police work finally points Fulcher towards a definite suspect. Fact-based crime drama, starring Martin Freeman(n)

programme.title: Who's Doing the Dishes?

The Carribean tour concludes at the famous sunset party at Shirley Heights, where he prepares one last cocktail recipe(n)

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: A book dealer is found drowned, having seemingly committed suicide in despair at having sunk all his cash in a local inventor's revolutionary new transport system - but the discovery of a second body makes it clear that there is a murderer at large. The iconic track goes back in time to the 1940s, 50s and 60s, as more than 150,000 fans adorn period fashion and enjoy the circuit exactly as it was in its heyday(n)

programme.title: Paul O'Grady's Little Heroes
programme.desc: Paul returns to meet more children who are receiving life-changing treatment at Great Ormond Street Hospital in London, including five-year-old chatterbox Daniel, who has been confined to a wheelchair for two weeks after being struck down out of the blue by juvenile idiopathic arthritis. Paul also speaks to 14-year-old Reagan, who has scoliosis, a progressive condition that has left her with an ever-increasing curvature in her spine, and 17-year-old Gavriel, who has Duchenne muscular dystrophy(n)

Period drama, starring Rose Williams and Theo James(n)

programme.title: Billy Connolly's Great American Trail
programme.desc: Billy visits Kearny, New Jersey, where he discovers it was the Scots who brought football to America. He then embarks on a pilgrimage to the Martin Guitar Company - the factory that has built guitars for some of the biggest rock stars on the planet, including Billy's hero Hank Williams. He also ventures to the Eastern State Penitentiary, which was once America's most notorious prison and the one-time residence of legendary gangster Al Capone(n)

programme.title: Australia with Julia Bradbury
programme.desc: Presenter Julia Bradbury travels 12,000km as she explores all four corners of Australia, finding out about the continent and the people who live there. programme.desc: Detective Superintendent Steve Fulcher takes chief suspect Christopher Halliwell to a remote location in the Wiltshire countryside to question him about the whereabouts of missing Swindon girl, Sian O'Callaghan. When Fulcher manages to gain Halliwell's trust, events take a turn that will change the lives of both men for ever, as Halliwell confesses to killing Sian along with a prostitute he murdered and buried in a field many years earlier. Drama, starring Martin Freeman, Joe Absolom and Siobhan Finneran(n)

programme.title: Serial Killer with Piers Morgan
programme.desc: The broadcaster meets Mark Riebe, who was convicted for one murder but has confessed multiple times to the abduction and killing of 13 women along Florida's Gulf Coast. Although Riebe has since withdrawn his confessions, police believe he is one of the worst serial killers in Florida's history. Piers uses Riebe's video and audio confessions, news archive and testimony to explore what sort of man would commit murder and then taunt the victims' families for nearly 20 years(n)

programme.title: The Darling Buds of May
programme.desc: Part two of two. The family warms to the French way of life, but Charley is unhappy with Mariette's flirting - and after a little Dutch courage, decides to take matters into his own hands. Drama, starring Philip Franks and Catherine Zeta-Jones(n)

programme.title: The Darling Buds of May
programme.desc: Part one of two. Pop busies himself organising a christening while awaiting the birth of his first grandchild - and still finds time to cast a beady eye over the contents of an elderly widow's home. Whimsical rural drama, starring David Jason, Pam Ferris, Philip Franks and Catherine Zeta-Jones(n)

programme.title: The Darling Buds of May
programme.desc: Part two of two. Preparations get under way for the christening, while Primrose loses her heart to a very confused vicar. Pop gets a black eye, Edith Pilchester tackles a gang of roving Teddy boys and Mademoiselle Dupont begins to feel ill. Drama, starring David Jason, Pam Ferris and Catherine Zeta-Jones(n)

programme.title: Inspector Morse
programme.desc: Ghosts from the past return to haunt Morse as he investigates the apparent suicide of a terminally ill Oxford don whose widow turns out to be the woman the detective was set to marry in his youth. As the case develops, Lewis worries his partner's professionalism is being undermined. Starring John Thaw and Kevin What, with Joanna David, Samantha Bond, David Haig, Adrian Dunbar and James Grout(n)

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: Beautiful Russian aristocrat Countess Vera Rossakoff, the chief suspect in a series of jewel thefts, seemingly captivates Poirot with her charm and intellect, meaning Hastings and Miss Lemon have to do most of the actual detective work and ensure she is brought to justice. Drama, guest starring Kika Markham(n)

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: The owner of local country magazine Midsomer Life becomes a suspect when a man's body is discovered in woodland, and it is established the victim had been having an affair with his wife. As Barnaby and Jones delve into the case, another murder forces them to reassess their inquiries. Detective drama, starring John Nettles, Jason Hughes and Simon Williams(n)

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: A magician's assistant drops dead on stage, poisoned by the toxins from a tropical frog. While Barnaby and Jones begin their investigations, tempers flare in the local community between Ernest, a firm believer in a mystical cult, and his former friend Aloysius - whose background in the jungles of South America makes him the prime suspect for the murder. Starring John Nettles, Ronald Pickup and Stuart Wilson(n)

programme.title: Foyle's War
programme.desc: Foyle investigates what he believes to be a burglary at the headquarters of a multinational company, and the murder of a Home Guard member during a large-scale exercise on the Sussex Downs soon leads him to believe the firm are conducting covert business with the Nazis - and that his former police sergeant may be involved. Second World War crime drama, starring Michael Kitchen and Anthony Howell(n)

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: During a music masterclass led by a renowned pianist, a shy prodigy suffers a panic attack and runs off to a nearby river. To her horror, she witnesses a woman drowning and a baby left on the riverbank. But when Barnaby arrives, there is no sign of the victim - and he is struck by similarities to another mysterious case that happened 20 years ago at the same spot. Guest starring veteran actor James Fox and Coronation Street's Ian Puleston-Davies (Owen Armstrong), alongside former Corrie star Richard Fleeshman (Craig Harris)(n)

programme.title: Endeavour
programme.desc: The discovery of a 2,000-year-old body provides fresh evidence in a five-year-old unsolved missing persons case, so Morse and Thursday take up the investigation, discovering a possible link to a local pagan ritual to celebrate the harvest. The investigation leads them to a nuclear power station, where they face a conspiracy of silence concerning an experimental new reactor and a potential disaster that could devastate Oxford. Guest starring Sheila Hancock, widow of original Inspector Morse star John Thaw(n)

programme.title: A Touch of Frost
programme.desc: A kidnapper demands a ransom from a supermarket magnate in return for sparing the life of a boy who has been reported missing. Frost manages to identify a likely suspect - but with no clues to go on, it looks as if throwing away the rule book may be the only way to save the child. David Jason and Bruce Alexander star(n)

programme.title: Emmerdale
programme.desc: Sarah is shocked when she sees Jack's black eye, Eric is not keen on setting up a joint account with Elizabeth, and Kim receives an enormous bouquet of flowers(n)

programme.title: Emmerdale
programme.desc: Lorraine is not pulling her weight at Lynn's, Annie and Sarah fall out over the plan to sell the farm, and Kim tells Neil that Kathy knows everything about their affair(n)

programme.title: Emmerdale
programme.desc: Frank has to go to Edinburgh, so Kim plans a day Christmas shopping with Neil. Carol is amazed when Archie offers to buy her a drink, and Annie is taken ill(n)

programme.title: ITV3 Nightscreen
programme.desc: Text-based information service(n)

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Buying goods from the comfort of home(n)

programme.title: Rising Damp
programme.desc: Alan and Philip goad Rigsby into fasting for three days - and it is not long before he is stealing Vienna's cat food to stave off the pangs of hunger. With Leonard Rossiter and Richard Beckinsale(n)

programme.title: The Royal
programme.desc: Dr Goodwin faces the pressure as rumours about him circulate the hospital and when Dr Weatherill passes on some important news, he wastes no time in using it to set the record straight. Nurse Taylor's happiness about her future with Frankie is sensationally shattered as the extent of his dishonesty is revealed, while Matron is shocked to see a familiar face on the ward(n)

programme.title: The Darling Buds of May
programme.desc: Part one of two. A handsome man from Denmark arrives at the household in search of work, setting Mariette's heart racing with his dashing good looks, but Charley is not impressed by the visitor's charms. Drama, starring David Jason, Catherine Zeta-Jones and Philip Franks(n)

programme.title: The Darling Buds of May
programme.desc: Part two of two. Mariette and Charley locate Pieter and beg him to stay, while Pop faces hostility from the villagers. Primrose does her best to make an impression on the Reverend Candy. David Jason and Pam Ferris star(n)

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: Steve comes to the aid of an amnesiac struggling to piece together his identity, Jenny tells Dennis she is tired of playing second fiddle to his career, and Bernie and David step in when it appears Vernon's money-making schemes are getting the better of him. Rural drama, starring James Carlton, Ian East, Peter Benson, David Lonsdale and Geoffrey Hughes(n)

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: Alf Ventress mounts a large-scale surveillance operation in an effort to track down the wool thief responsible for de-fleecing sheep in Aidensfield. Bernie finds himself in hot water when an estranged son arrives to bury his father - who is already six feet under. Drama, starring James Carlton and Peter Benson(n)

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: A lavish dinner party proves to be a prelude to murder and intrigue - but fortunately Poirot is among the guests, and soon realises the key to the mystery lies in a duel fought 10 years previously. Drama, starring David Suchet, Caroline Langrishe and John McEnery(n)

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: Barnaby and Jones are called away from a team-building exercise to investigate a fatal explosion at a haulage yard in Calham Cross. The property is owned by Territorial Army commanding officer Matt Parkes, the father of a businessman whose ruthlessness in the boardroom is matched only by his behaviour toward women. To complicate matters, the village is also home to a peace protester and a grieving mother - and Barnaby has to decide if any of these locals is capable of arson and murder. John Nettles and Jason Hughes star, with Tim Pigott-Smith, Joseph Millson, Niamh Cusack, Judy Parfitt and Nick Fletcher(n)

programme.title: Inspector Morse
programme.desc: The murder of a well-known business tycoon leads Morse to investigate the man's feuding family, and inadvertently makes him the unwitting target of a hate campaign by the tabloids - a problem compounded by his uneasy relationship with a new chief superintendent. John Thaw and Kevin Whately star alongside Gwen Taylor, Martin Clunes, Alun Armstrong, Anna Massey, Charlotte Coleman and Rupert Graves(n)

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Marple
programme.desc: Geraldine McEwan makes her last appearance as the spinster sleuth before handing over the knitting needles to Julia McKenzie. Following the death of old acquaintance Mr Rafiel, Miss Marple receives instructions drawn up prior to his demise asking her to embark on a coach tour to investigate an unspecified possible crime. It soon transpires that many of her companions are also travelling at his invitation and they are all in some way connected to a girl who went missing from a nun's sanctuary during World War Two, supposedly to be with her German lover, Rafiel's son Michael. Murder mystery, with a star-studded supporting cast including Richard E Grant, Johnny Briggs, Amanda Burton, Anne Reid, Ronni Ancona, George Cole, Will Mellor and Laura Michelle Kelly(n)

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: In Dover, Lieutenant Colin Race is investigating the deaths of two Navy personnel when a distraught Sheila Webb runs out of 19 Wilbraham Crescent and into his arms. Inside the house, Colin finds the body of a murder victim surrounded by stopped clocks. Mystery, starring David Suchet, Anna Massey, Jaime Winstone, Lesley Sharp, Phil Daniels, Geoffrey Palmer and Tessa Peake-Jones(n)

programme.title: Joanna Lumley's Japan
programme.desc: The actress flies over Tokyo in a helicopter. The city was bombed extensively during the Second World War, so almost all of it is a symbol of the post-war economic boom that saw Japan become the world's second largest economy. While in the capital, Joanna heads out to a nightclub to see a Japanese girl band and witnesses the largely male audience perform almost as much as the artists on stage. Later, Joanna travels to the Kiso Valley to walk the Nakasendo Way, an ancient route that once linked Tokyo to Kyoto, a place best known for that most famous of Japanese traditions, the Geisha(n)

programme.title: The Halcyon
programme.desc: Emma is in charge of the hotel and she is put to the test hosting a society wedding for Lady Hamilton's friends the Ashworths, and has to stand up to the owner when there is an air-raid. Celina Radimsky comes to the hotel to meet Freddie, who tries to offer consolation after her husband's death, and Garland goes to the East End to help Peggy with some housekeeping, but has an encounter with a figure from his past while waiting outside a shop. Olivia Williams and Steven Mackintosh star, with a guest appearance by Jamie Cullum(n)

programme.title: The Halcyon
programme.desc: Life at the hotel continues as the Blitz rages. Emma finds Joe waiting for her at the staff entrance, remarkably curious about her work for the WVS, while Toby is worried sick after hearing a bomb fell on a shelter in Adil's neighbourhood of Paddington and killed everyone inside. Billy visits the kitchens and tells Dora that he has a job for her, while Lucian offers Lady Hamilton emotional support and Betsey and Sonny have a major altercation. Drama, starring Olivia Williams and Steven Mackintosh(n)

programme.title: Tutankhamun
programme.desc: Carter finally discovers the Pharaoh's tomb in 1922, but is forced to wait for weeks before opening the sealed doorway, so local authorities can be present. The find is also overshadowed by local tension as the struggle for Egyptian independence intensifies. Carter's relationship with the press also causes problems for Carnarvon, driving a wedge between the two men in their hour of triumph(n)

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: The Belgian detective looks forward to a quiet Christmas, but is disturbed by the Foreign Office when an Egyptian prince loses a famous ruby - after making the mistake of lending it to a mysterious woman. Guest starring Stephanie Cole, Nigel Le Vaillant and Tariq Alibai(n)

programme.title: Emmerdale
programme.desc: The day of the Home Farm shoot arrives, Annie is in bed with bronchitis, Nick gets the wrong idea about Archie and Julie, and Mark feels terrible after a night in the Woolpack(n)

programme.title: Emmerdale
programme.desc: Rachel brings Jayesh home to meet the Sugdens, Neil pressures Kim to come away with him, Michael sneaks out of the house and breaks his curfew time, and Mark resigns from the farm(n)

programme.title: Emmerdale
programme.desc: The day of Michael's committal hearing arrives, and he asks Elizabeth not to go with him. Sangeeta is startled by a prowler, and Jack's anger about the farm boils over(n)

programme.title: Emmerdale
programme.desc: Amos lets slip to Jack that he and Sarah are planning a surprise for Annie at Christmas. Jack rants to Joe about how Frank Tate is trying to put him out of business(n)

programme.title: Emmerdale
programme.desc: Elizabeth gives Eric a hard time about selling the car to Mark. Jayesh recovers from his attack, and Jack wants to know what surprise Sarah is planning for Annie(n)

programme.title: Emmerdale
programme.desc: Jack is furious with Sarah for inviting Leonard to stay. Kim tries to involve Kathy in the running of the stables. Zoe arrives home and wants Kim to fill her in on all the gossip(n)

programme.title: On the Buses
programme.desc: Stan and Jack are chosen to go on a training course. Comedy, starring Reg Varney and Bob Grant(n)

programme.title: On the Buses
programme.desc: Stan and Jack are assigned by Blakey to take a class of rowdy schoolchildren on their annual outing. Comedy, starring Reg Varney and Bob Grant(n)

programme.title: ITV3 Nightscreen
programme.desc: Text-based information service(n)

programme.title: Coronation Street
programme.desc: Denise is upset that to Hanif she is nothing but a bit of fun. Curly is annoyed when Reg alters the lunch rota so he can be with Maureen(n)

programme.title: Coronation Street
programme.desc: Denise turns to Don for comfort, Brendan invites Deirdre for a drink after work, and Steve and Liz are alerted to the break-in and check the house to see what has been taken(n)

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: Dr Tricia Summerbee tries to get back to normal following her near-fatal heart attack, despite Mike's concerns that she has returned to work too soon. Elsewhere, Ventress investigates a murder in the village - and gets a shock when the prime suspect turns out to be a thief he certified dead more than 15 years earlier. Jason Durr, Clare Calbraith and William Simons star(n)

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: Jessica is on hand to help a puppet designer when he runs into difficulties with his own creations - but after a security guard is killed, she finds herself on the trail of a murderer. Detective drama, guest starring Malcolm in the Middle's Bryan Cranston, with Angela Lansbury(n)

programme.title: On the Buses
programme.desc: Stan injures his foot in the bath and worries he will no longer be able to drive. However, conductor Jack is ready to offer plenty of good advice. Comedy, starring Reg Varney(n)

programme.title: On the Buses
programme.desc: Stan's spirits are lifted by the arrival of a beautiful new waitress. Comedy, starring Reg Varney(n)

programme.title: Rising Damp
programme.desc: Rigsby invests in some new furniture in a desperate attempt to impress Ruth's replacement, Brenda, but makes the mistake of opting to pay for it on the never-never. Leonard Rossiter and Gay Rose star(n)

programme.title: The Darling Buds of May
programme.desc: Part one of two. Pop befriends a pilot he rescues from his crashed plane, but suspects he is being drawn into a smuggling racket when the family is invited to a celebratory champagne night on the town. Drama, starring David Jason(n)

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: An archaeologist dies of a heart attack shortly after smashing the seal of an ancient Egyptian tomb, raising the spectre of the mummy's curse. The grieving widow summons the Belgian sleuth to unravel the mystery, but he can only smoke out the real villain by risking his own life. David Suchet stars, with Anna Cropper and Bill Bailey(n)

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: The village is plagued by a spate of burglaries, and the finger of suspicion points to a most unlikely perpetrator, revealing a heartbreaking tale of domestic abuse and family tragedy. Elsewhere, Vernon resolves to dig out his books on hypnotism and put an end to Gina's arachnophobia, but his early experiments on David leave his patient feeling rather peculiar, while Dennis and Jenny discover a mutual love of jazz(n)

programme.title: Emmerdale
programme.desc: Sarah teases Annie about Leonard, Lorraine makes a surprise visit to see her mum, Neil and Kim exchange Christmas presents, and Neil presses her to leave Frank(n)

programme.title: Emmerdale
programme.desc: It is Christmas morning and Lorraine if feeling neglected. Jack apologises to Leonard, and Frank is speechless when Kim gives him a picture instead of the watch as a gift(n)

programme.title: Coronation Street
programme.desc: Angie hears that Hanif has dumped Denise and offers her an ear to talk to. Joe tells Sally he is finalising his divorce, and Maureen wants Maud to be part of the wedding(n)

programme.title: Coronation Street
programme.desc: Alma is annoyed that Mike did not tell her he was going to the school to talk about Mark. Raquel feels Gordon does not compare with Colin and begins to go off him(n)

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: Two couples disappear in the tiny village of Monks Barton amid rumours of witchcraft and haunted woods. As Barnaby and Jones investigate, psychic Cyrus LeVanu clashes with cleric Wallace Stone over their different methods of 'healing' the woods, while other locals seem to be caught up in a stolen antiques racket. When a body is unearthed and the death toll rises, the detectives race to catch the killer by finding a connection between the missing couples and the thefts. Anton Lesser guest stars, with John Nettles and Jason Hughes(n)

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: The village is plagued by a spate of burglaries, and the finger of suspicion points to a most unlikely perpetrator, revealing a heartbreaking tale of domestic abuse and family tragedy. Elsewhere, Vernon resolves to dig out his books on hypnotism and put an end to Gina's arachnophobia, but his early experiments on David leave his patient feeling rather peculiar, while Dennis and Jenny discover a mutual love of jazz(n)

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: Jessica Fletcher tackles a mystery involving a diamond, a dog and an old grudge while on holiday at a friend's lodge in the Grand Teton mountains. A surly visitor who threatened to reveal some scandalous information about her friend is found dead. Angela Lansbury stars(n)

programme.title: Doc Martin
programme.desc: Pauline finds out about Martin's imminent departure to London and confronts him over her uncertain future. Aunt Joan tries to solve her farm's money problems by opening a B&B - and ends up having to call the doctor for her first guest, local farmer Ted. Elsewhere, Bert organises a baby shower for Louisa. David Ross (The Green Green Grass) guest stars, with Martin Clunes, Stephanie Cole and Caroline Catz(n)

programme.title: Doc Martin
programme.desc: The doctor spends his last day in Portwenn seeing an influx of patients as he prepares to close down the surgery and move to London. As he bids farewell to old friends and sets off to leave the village, he sees Louisa's teaching assistant Tasha fall from the Harbour Day stage and stops to help. But the bigger hold-up comes when pregnant Louisa is involved in a car accident. Martin Clunes and Caroline Catz star(n)

programme.title: Scott & Bailey
programme.desc: A gangland killing takes a surprising twist when it turns out the victim has been sexually mutilated. Andy punishes Janet by keeping her out of the heart of the investigation, and when she rebels, the ensuing row becomes personal. Rachel feels ambushed by Sean, who announces his mother wants to meet her - especially as she has spent years trying not to think about her own mum. Suranne Jones, Lesley Sharp, Sean Maguire and Nicholas Gleaves star(n)

programme.title: Scott & Bailey
programme.desc: Rachel discovers Nick has been brutally assaulted - and she is top of the list of suspects. But even worse, she has no recollection of the previous night after a drunken hen party, and struggles to convince herself she did not do it. Janet thinks she has made her peace with Andy, until he gives her some misinformation that results in Gill missing an appointment with the coroner - so the DCI, tired of their games, announces one of them will have to go. A man's accidental death turns into a murder investigation when his daughters reveal their mother often talked of killing him. Crime drama, starring Lesley Sharp and Suranne Jones(n)

programme.title: On the Buses
programme.desc: Mum and Olive are suffering from the flu _ leaving Stan and Arthur to do all the chores(n)

programme.title: On the Buses
programme.desc: Stan smuggles some tools out of work to help Arthur to get his motorcycle working(n)

programme.title: ITV3 Nightscreen
programme.desc: Text-based information service(n)

programme.title: Rising Damp
programme.desc: Alan smuggles a woman up to his room, making sure the lights are turned down low so she cannot see how shabby it is - but an unscheduled appearance by her irate father soon puts paid to his dreams of romance. Leonard Rossiter and Richard Beckinsale star(n)

programme.title: The Darling Buds of May
programme.desc: Part two of two. The family warms to the French way of life, but Charley is unhappy with Mariette's flirting - and after a little Dutch courage, decides to take matters into his own hands. Drama, starring Philip Franks and Catherine Zeta-Jones(n)

programme.title: The Darling Buds of May
programme.desc: Part one of two. Pop busies himself organising a christening while awaiting the birth of his first grandchild - and still finds time to cast a beady eye over the contents of an elderly widow's home. Whimsical rural drama, starring David Jason, Pam Ferris, Philip Franks and Catherine Zeta-Jones(n)

programme.title: The Darling Buds of May
programme.desc: Part two of two. Preparations get under way for the christening, while Primrose loses her heart to a very confused vicar. Pop gets a black eye, Edith Pilchester tackles a gang of roving Teddy boys and Mademoiselle Dupont begins to feel ill. Drama, starring David Jason, Pam Ferris and Catherine Zeta-Jones(n)

programme.title: Inspector Morse
programme.desc: Ghosts from the past return to haunt Morse as he investigates the apparent suicide of a terminally ill Oxford don whose widow turns out to be the woman the detective was set to marry in his youth. As the case develops, Lewis worries his partner's professionalism is being undermined. Starring John Thaw and Kevin What, with Joanna David, Samantha Bond, David Haig, Adrian Dunbar and James Grout(n)

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: Beautiful Russian aristocrat Countess Vera Rossakoff, the chief suspect in a series of jewel thefts, seemingly captivates Poirot with her charm and intellect, meaning Hastings and Miss Lemon have to do most of the actual detective work and ensure she is brought to justice. Drama, guest starring Kika Markham(n)

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: The owner of local country magazine Midsomer Life becomes a suspect when a man's body is discovered in woodland, and it is established the victim had been having an affair with his wife. As Barnaby and Jones delve into the case, another murder forces them to reassess their inquiries. Detective drama, starring John Nettles, Jason Hughes and Simon Williams(n)

programme.desc: A magician's assistant drops dead on stage, poisoned by the toxins from a tropical frog. programme.title: Emmerdale
programme.desc: The day of the Home Farm shoot arrives, Annie is in bed with bronchitis, Nick gets the wrong idea about Archie and Julie, and Mark feels terrible after a night in the Woolpack(n)

programme.title: Emmerdale
programme.desc: Rachel brings Jayesh home to meet the Sugdens, Neil pressures Kim to come away with him, Michael sneaks out of the house and breaks his curfew time, and Mark resigns from the farm(n)

programme.title: Emmerdale
programme.desc: The day of Michael's committal hearing arrives, and he asks Elizabeth not to go with him. Sangeeta is startled by a prowler, and Jack's anger about the farm boils over(n)

programme.title: Emmerdale
programme.desc: Amos lets slip to Jack that he and Sarah are planning a surprise for Annie at Christmas. Jack rants to Joe about how Frank Tate is trying to put him out of business(n)

programme.title: Emmerdale
programme.desc: Elizabeth gives Eric a hard time about selling the car to Mark. Jayesh recovers from his attack, and Jack wants to know what surprise Sarah is planning for Annie(n)

programme.title: Emmerdale
programme.desc: Jack is furious with Sarah for inviting Leonard to stay. Kim tries to involve Kathy in the running of the stables. Zoe arrives home and wants Kim to fill her in on all the gossip(n)

programme.title: On the Buses
programme.desc: Stan and Jack are chosen to go on a training course. Comedy, starring Reg Varney and Bob Grant(n)

programme.title: Coronation Street
programme.desc: Denise is upset that to Hanif she is nothing but a bit of fun. Curly is annoyed when Reg alters the lunch rota so he can be with Maureen(n)

programme.title: Coronation Street
programme.desc: Denise turns to Don for comfort, Brendan invites Deirdre for a drink after work, and Steve and Liz are alerted to the break-in and check the house to see what has been taken(n)

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: Dr Tricia Summerbee tries to get back to normal following her near-fatal heart attack, despite Mike's concerns that she has returned to work too soon. Elsewhere, Ventress investigates a murder in the village - and gets a shock when the prime suspect turns out to be a thief he certified dead more than 15 years earlier. Jason Durr, Clare Calbraith and William Simons star(n)

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: Jessica is on hand to help a puppet designer when he runs into difficulties with his own creations - but after a security guard is killed, she finds herself on the trail of a murderer. Detective drama, guest starring Malcolm in the Middle's Bryan Cranston, with Angela Lansbury(n)

programme.title: On the Buses
programme.desc: Stan injures his foot in the bath and worries he will no longer be able to drive. However, conductor Jack is ready to offer plenty of good advice. Comedy, starring Reg Varney(n)

programme.title: On the Buses
programme.desc: Stan's spirits are lifted by the arrival of a beautiful new waitress. Comedy, starring Reg Varney(n)

programme.title: Rising Damp
programme.desc: Rigsby invests in some new furniture in a desperate attempt to impress Ruth's replacement, Brenda, but makes the mistake of opting to pay for it on the never-never. Leonard Rossiter and Gay Rose star(n)

programme.title: The Darling Buds of May
programme.desc: Part one of two. Pop befriends a pilot he rescues from his crashed plane, but suspects he is being drawn into a smuggling racket when the family is invited to a celebratory champagne night on the town. Drama, starring David Jason(n)

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: An archaeologist dies of a heart attack shortly after smashing the seal of an ancient Egyptian tomb, raising the spectre of the mummy's curse. The grieving widow summons the Belgian sleuth to unravel the mystery, but he can only smoke out the real villain by risking his own life. David Suchet stars, with Anna Cropper and Bill Bailey(n)

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: The village is plagued by a spate of burglaries, and the finger of suspicion points to a most unlikely perpetrator, revealing a heartbreaking tale of domestic abuse and family tragedy. Elsewhere, Vernon resolves to dig out his books on hypnotism and put an end to Gina's arachnophobia, but his early experiments on David leave his patient feeling rather peculiar, while Dennis and Jenny discover a mutual love of jazz(n)

programme.title: Emmerdale
programme.desc: Sarah teases Annie about Leonard, Lorraine makes a surprise visit to see her mum, Neil and Kim exchange Christmas presents, and Neil presses her to leave Frank(n)

programme.title: Emmerdale
programme.desc: It is Christmas morning and Lorraine if feeling neglected. Jack apologises to Leonard, and Frank is speechless when Kim gives him a picture instead of the watch as a gift(n)

programme.title: Coronation Street
programme.desc: Angie hears that Hanif has dumped Denise and offers her an ear to talk to. Joe tells Sally he is finalising his divorce, and Maureen wants Maud to be part of the wedding(n)

programme.title: Coronation Street
programme.desc: Alma is annoyed that Mike did not tell her he was going to the school to talk about Mark. Raquel feels Gordon does not compare with Colin and begins to go off him(n)

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: Two couples disappear in the tiny village of Monks Barton amid rumours of witchcraft and haunted woods. As Barnaby and Jones investigate, psychic Cyrus LeVanu clashes with cleric Wallace Stone over their different methods of 'healing' the woods, while other locals seem to be caught up in a stolen antiques racket. When a body is unearthed and the death toll rises, the detectives race to catch the killer by finding a connection between the missing couples and the thefts. Anton Lesser guest stars, with John Nettles and Jason Hughes(n)

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: The village is plagued by a spate of burglaries, and the finger of suspicion points to a most unlikely perpetrator, revealing a heartbreaking tale of domestic abuse and family tragedy. Elsewhere, Vernon resolves to dig out his books on hypnotism and put an end to Gina's arachnophobia, but his early experiments on David leave his patient feeling rather peculiar, while Dennis and Jenny discover a mutual love of jazz(n)

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: Jessica Fletcher tackles a mystery involving a diamond, a dog and an old grudge while on holiday at a friend's lodge in the Grand Teton mountains. A surly visitor who threatened to reveal some scandalous information about her friend is found dead. Angela Lansbury stars(n)

programme.title: Doc Martin
programme.desc: Pauline finds out about Martin's imminent departure to London and confronts him over her uncertain future. Aunt Joan tries to solve her farm's money problems by opening a B&B - and ends up having to call the doctor for her first guest, local farmer Ted. Elsewhere, Bert organises a baby shower for Louisa. David Ross (The Green Green Grass) guest stars, with Martin Clunes, Stephanie Cole and Caroline Catz(n)

programme.title: Doc Martin
programme.desc: The doctor spends his last day in Portwenn seeing an influx of patients as he prepares to close down the surgery and move to London. As he bids farewell to old friends and sets off to leave the village, he sees Louisa's teaching assistant Tasha fall from the Harbour Day stage and stops to help. But the bigger hold-up comes when pregnant Louisa is involved in a car accident. Martin Clunes and Caroline Catz star(n)

programme.title: Scott & Bailey
programme.desc: A gangland killing takes a surprising twist when it turns out the victim has been sexually mutilated. Andy punishes Janet by keeping her out of the heart of the investigation, and when she rebels, the ensuing row becomes personal. Rachel feels ambushed by Sean, who announces his mother wants to meet her - especially as she has spent years trying not to think about her own mum. Suranne Jones, Lesley Sharp, Sean Maguire and Nicholas Gleaves star(n)

Crime drama, starring Peter Falk, Roddy McDowall and Ida Lupino(n)

Can he reveal the culprit and deliver it to the scientists searching for evidence of mutant species?(n)

programme.title: Live British Touring Car Championship
programme.desc: Steve Rider and Louise Goodman present coverage of round eight from Knockhill, where the 22nd, 23rd and 24th races of the season are scheduled to take place. Reigning champion Colin Turkington currently leads the standings, with teammate Andrew Jordan his nearest challenger. Commentary by David Addison, Tim Harvey, Paul O'Neill, Richard John Neil and Phil Glew(n)

programme.title: The Car Chasers
programme.desc: The team is contracted to deliver four pristine classic showpieces to Universal's Cabana Bay Beach Resort in Orlando, Florida. As delivery time nears they only have one car ready - a 1957 Ford Woody Wagon - and Jeff and Meg are forced to pull out all the stops to make the deal(n)

programme.title: World of Sport: Petrol Heads
programme.desc: Richard Henwood looks back at archive motorsport action, featuring the likes of James Hunt and Barry Sheene, with a spectacular crash involving Kelvin Burt(n)

programme.title: The Day We Walked on the Moon
programme.desc: On July 20 1969, astronaut Neil Armstrong became the first man to walk on the moon. This documentary reveals how he got there, using a combination of spectacular footage and interviews with key figures in the Apollo 11 mission, including astronaut Michael Collins, who piloted the command module while Armstrong and Buzz Aldrin made their historic moonwalk. Narrated by Mark Strong(n)

programme.title: Hornblower
programme.desc: First of a two-part drama, which sees CS Forester's seafaring hero crossing swords with tyrannical Captain James Sawyer, an officer on the brink of madness. Reprimanded for falling asleep while on watch, young Horatio partly redeems himself by saving the Renown from seemingly certain disaster _ but ends up charged with mutiny. Ioan Gruffudd, Robert Lindsay and David Warner star(n)

programme.desc: A maverick cop, transferred to a tough new precinct, determines to make a difference to the lawless streets, but he comes to realise his fellow officers are even more corrupt than the local hoods - and are on the verge of completing a major drug deal. programme.title: The Saint
programme.desc: An engineer hatches a plan to immortalise people by freezing them and bringing them back to life, and decides Simon Templar would make the ideal guinea pig(n)

programme.title: Kojak
programme.desc: Two brothers end up killing a priest at a Catholic school when a truck hijack goes wrong. The case proves embarrassing for the cops, since Crocker was giving a lecture at the time(n)

programme.title: Minder
programme.desc: Arthur's car lot is threatened with closure, spurring him to enter the cut-and-thrust world of local politics to have more of a say in local issues. Comedy drama, starring Dennis Waterman, George Cole and Lennard Pearce, best remembered as Grandad in Only Fools and Horses(n)

programme.title: Cycling: Vuelta a Espana

programme.title: The Professionals
programme.desc: Bodie and Doyle are trained to act as bodyguards to a Middle Eastern president who is preparing to sign an important peace treaty. Meanwhile, two killers are receiving similar training to prepare them to assassinate him. As their paths cross, the CI5 operatives learn the would-be killers have some useful inside information and share more in common with them than they may have imagined(n)

programme.title: The Saint
programme.desc: Templar is asked by the former king of Fedyra to accompany him on an important mission in Switzerland, where he becomes aide to a queen(n)

programme.title: Kojak
programme.desc: Theo investigates the murder of a plastic surgeon shot dead in his car, and arrests a drug dealer - only to find that the victim was already dead when the gun was fired(n)

programme.title: Quincy ME
programme.desc: The LA punk rock scene comes under the spotlight when a teenage boy is murdered in a club while dancing to lyrics about death and violence(n)

programme.title: Minder
programme.desc: Arthur is captivated by an attractive female vocalist, who boasts limited musical talent. Nevertheless, he uses his contacts to secure a gig for her at a club run by a dodgy entertainment manager, and soon both he and Terry find themselves immersed in the seedier side of the showbiz industry during a night's work in a disco. Comedy drama, starring Dennis Waterman and George Cole(n)

programme.title: The Professionals
programme.desc: Bodie and Doyle's country holiday with their latest girlfriends spirals into chaos when they are held hostage in a farmhouse by two gunmen who have just botched a robbery. Adventure, with Gordon Jackson, Lewis Collins and Martin Shaw(n)

programme.title: The Sweeney
programme.desc: A Scottish detective on the trail of a gang of crooks requests help, and the squad resolves to catch his quarry. However, it becomes apparent that the visiting sleuth is holding back some important information that Regan and his colleagues need to know. TV presenter Janet Ellis features in a supporting role(n)

programme.title: The Chase
programme.desc: Bradley Walsh presents as four contestants pit their wits against ruthless quiz genius the Chaser in the hope of winning a potential prize pot worth thousands of pounds. They work as a team and play strategically to answer general knowledge questions against the clock and race down the game board to the exit without being caught(n)

programme.title: Speed Freaks
programme.desc: After months of preparation, Zef Eisenberg and his team attempt to break the flying mile record at Pendine Sands. They have tripled the horsepower of a Porsche Turbo S, but plagued by mechanical problems and with bad weather looming, it still promises to be a difficult challenge(n)

programme.title: Benidorm
programme.desc: The Dawsons continue to speculate about Cyd's motives, but Rob pops the question anyway, while both Kenneth and Callum have romantic entanglements. Joyce appoints Monty as the new Entertainments Manager at the Solana and he plans a magical evening at Neptunes(n)

programme.desc: A former US Air Force pilot comes out of retirement for a top-secret mission - to go undercover behind the Iron Curtain and steal a hi-tech Soviet fighter plane that is invisible to radar and equipped with a thought-controlled weapons system. Cold War action adventure, directed by and starring Clint Eastwood. With Freddie Jones, David Huffman and Warren Clarke(n)

programme.title: River Monsters

programme.title: The Day We Walked on the Moon

Narrated by Mark Strong(n)

programme.title: Hornblower

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer joins the Stonecutters - a secret society responsible for just about everything that goes wrong in the world - and is hailed as their leader thanks to an ancient prophecy and a unequally shaped birthmark. Featuring the guest voice of Patrick Stewart(n)

programme.title: The Simpsons

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: In Manchester, married couple Victoria and Andrew kick off with an Italian-themed menu. This divides girlfriends Ciara and Carley, while Terri and husband David aren't keen on the couples' decision to invite a gospel choir to perform. Day two sees fitness-loving Ciara and Carley cooking up a healthy, clean-eating menu. However, Victoria and Andrew are left feeling worse for wear after a game of smoothie pong involving sprout juice, and Terri is less than pleased with the sportswear dress code. Finally, it's retro-loving Terri and David's chance to bring back the '70s to try to bag the grand(n)

programme.title: Four in a Bed

programme.title: Four in a Bed

programme.title: Four in a Bed

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The final stay is at Adhurst Yurts in Petersfield, Hampshire, where owner Alison Lubbock surprises the guests by revealing they are going to spend a night under the stars(n)

programme.title: The Secret Life of the Zoo
programme.desc: Flamingo chick Marley faces a tough childhood when mother Calypso loses interest in her duties - leaving dad Rum to do the work of two parents. The keepers are concerned when a newborn foal takes a turn for the worse, and a Sulawesi macaque monkey Rumple gives birth to a baby called Rey, only for the baby to get bullied by some of the higher-ranking females(n)

programme.title: The Dog House
programme.desc: Documentary set inside Wood Green animal charity. A two-year-old Pomeranian called Bear arrives at the centre, rescued from a life spent caged on a puppy farm. Can Bear learn to trust again and win the hearts of a family looking for a dog? Meanwhile, Knobby the Chihuahua puppy tries to charm his way into the affections and home of couple Alex and Kier(n)

programme.title: A Place in the Sun: Summer Sun
programme.desc: Lyndsey and Paul from Glasgow are newly engaged and want to kick start the next chapter of their lives together by buying a family holiday home in the area around Oliva in eastern Spain. Ben Hillman leaves no stone unturned to find property contenders for their budget of £50,000(n)

programme.title: Grand Designs
programme.desc: Kevin McCloud meets entrepreneur Paul Wilkinson and his wife Amy, who are building a giant new home on a 16-acre plot in Lincolnshire. The superstructure will be comprised of five circular buildings made up of interlocking timber cylinders, linked by raised wooden walkways that hang over a fishing lake. The complicated build proves difficult for Paul's local team, and their ambitious schedule of completing the project in a year soon looks out of reach(n)

programme.title: Channel 4 News
programme.desc: Including sport and weather(n)

programme.title: Secrets of Egypt's Valley of the Kings
programme.desc: Archaeologists find new evidence about how the ancient Egyptians prepared for the afterlife, including a sacred text found in the tomb of the great pharaoh Seti I which was believed to guarantee life after death. An expedition unearths a sealed tomb that has lain untouched for 4000 years, and discovers disturbing evidence of the lengths grave robbers will go to in search of treasure(n)

programme.title: Britain at Low Tide
programme.desc: Palaeobiologist Dr Tori Herridge and her team of experts explore the north coast of Kent around Whitstable. The programme takes a look at the excavation of one of the most significant shipwreck discoveries of recent times, the origins of a strange sandbar, and a forgotten military base in an unusual location which proved pivotal in deciding the outcome of the First World War. Plus, a look at how rising sea levels and coastal erosion mean that a great deal of archaeology may be lost before it can be documented(n)

programme.title: Eye in the Sky (2015)
programme.desc: Colonel Katherine Powell's mission to wipe out a terrorist cell in Kenya is complicated when a girl enters the blast radius of the intended drone strike. Powell has to decide between sacrificing the girl's life or letting the terrorists flee to carry out more atrocities. Thriller, starring Helen Mirren, Alan Rickman and Aaron Paul(n)

programme.title: Gods of Egypt (2016)
programme.desc: An ancient Egyptian god is driven into exile when his evil brother murders their father and seizes his throne. He enlists the aid of a human thief in restoring justice, and in return offers to help the mortal to bring his murdered lover back to life. Fantasy adventure, starring Nikolaj Coster-Waldau, Brenton Thwaites, Gerard Butler and Chadwick Boseman(n)

First, the contestants must prepare a signature bake that is designed to be shared, while the ingredients for a popular summer staple are lurking beneath the gingham cloth in the technical challenge. Finally, an ambitious Showstopper will test their steady hands and artistic flair(n)

programme.desc: Including sport and weather(n)

programme.title: The World's Most Luxurious Airline
programme.desc: While leading airlines battling it out for the number one spot as the world's most luxurious flyer, this documentary reveals the exacting standards first-class passengers expect when wining and dining in the skies - with Michelin-style food, limitless champagne, and a deluxe first-class suite for the super wealthy. With exclusive access to Singapore Airlines, the film reveals the lengths the airline goes to building a first-class suite for the super wealthy, spending $850m over the course of four years(n)

programme.title: Inside Cadbury: Chocolate Secrets Unwrapped
programme.desc: Documentary examining the world of one of Britain's biggest and best-loved chocolate makers. Behind closed doors at Cadbury's Bournville plant, a team of scientists struggle to meet the biggest challenge the company has faced for a century, to dramatically cut sugar from their Dairy Milk recipe. Can the new bar match up to its beloved predecessor?(n)

programme.desc: Four days in, and the contestants are struggling. There's £100,000 hidden in the jungle, waiting to be found, but the group are busy battling sleep deprivation thanks to an insect infestation. Plumber Jack wrestles a potential meal from the grip of a python, and crisis hits when the islanders realise there is a major issue with their water supply. Ex-marine Marco and hereditary peer Ivar are sitting on a secret stash of £35,000. They volunteer to lead the search for a new water source - but can they be trusted to put the interests of the group before their own?(n)

programme.title: Adventures in Futureland

programme.title: RoboCop (2014)

Sci-fi thriller remake, starring Joel Kinnaman, Gary Oldman, Michael Keaton and Samuel L Jackson(n)

programme.title: Dispatches
programme.desc: Following the convictions of serial killer Stephen Port and murderer Gerald Matovu, who both used GHB as their weapon, Dispatches has conducted an eight-month investigation with BuzzFeed News into the use of the drug among gay men. With the largest ever survey of GHB users, Dispatches reveals for the first time the human cost of the epidemic scale of abuse, with over a quarter of users reporting being sexually assaulted, almost half having overdosed, thousands of hospital admissions, and a hidden crime spree: rape, murder, and the live-streaming of sexual abuse. The law allows GBL to be sold for cleaning purposes, which enables easy access to industrial quantities of it online, which can then be used/sold as GHB to users. Dispatches interviews men who have been deliberately overdosed, raped, and those including Lord Brian Paddick who have lost partners and family members(n)

programme.title: The Great British Bake Off: An Extra Slice

programme.title: Hidden Britain by Drone

programme.title: World's Most Luxurious...
programme.desc: Only the world's richest can possibly afford a super yacht, but it is not the price tag that makes these extravagant vessels exceptional, it is the luxurious details. Here, members of the billionaire Haidar family display their 52-metre floating palace, where a 13-strong staff attends to their every need. Plus, cameras sneak a peek behind the scenes as a charter yacht is prepared for a group of wealthy Americans and follow Becki Milton, private yacht shopper to the super-rich, as she finds the ultimate getaway for three secretive celebs(n)

programme.title: British Airways 24/7: Access All Areas
programme.desc: How the airline is attempting to win back the premier market by introducing a new First Class service, following the cabin crew who embark on an intensive training course to learn how to deliver five-star luxury at 40,000ft. At the airline's state-of-the-art engineering base in Wales, the team must completely strip down and refit the interior of one of Boeing's most popular jets, the 777 - and they have only 30 days to do it. Meanwhile, the airline waves goodbye to an old friend as the 767 takes its final flight, bowing out after 30 years of service with BA(n)

programme.title: 5 News Weekend
programme.desc: Round-up of the day's headlines from around the world(n)

programme.title: Cricket on 5
programme.desc: England v Australia. Action from the third day of the series-concluding Fifth Test, taking place at the Kia Oval in London. England trail the series 2-1 after losing to the Aussies by 185 runs last time out at Old Trafford, meaning the Ashes will stay in Australia regardless of the result in this match, but the hosts will still be eager to restore pride by drawing the series(n)

programme.title: Around the World by Train with Tony Robinson
programme.desc: The actor heads to Thailand, where he emerges from the Chiang Mai train station to find himself amid a Buddhist ceremony in which the town's citizens offer gifts to monks from the local temple, with Tony joining the monks to grasp what their daily life entails. Crossing the border into Malaysia, he instantly sees echoes of British rule everywhere, before ending in Kuala Lumpur, where he discovers a city of wild contrasts. He also travels across Australia, visits a vast Outback farm where herding is done by helicopter and learns about the uncertain future facing the Great Barrier Reef(n)

programme.title: Pompeii's Final Hours: New Evidence
programme.desc: Historian Bettany Hughes, archaeologist Raksha Dave and John Sergeant reveal fresh evidence surrounding the volcano's eruption. They begin on October 22, 79AD, two days before Pompeii is destroyed, and piece together the final hours of the doomed city. Raksha joins a live dig, and John visits nearby Naples to find out how the Roman way of life has survived for 2,000 years(n)

programme.title: Pompeii's Final Hours: New Evidence
programme.desc: Bettany Hughes, John Sergeant and Raksha Dave investigate what happened on the eve of the eruption, with John diving under the streets of Naples to find the extraordinary remains of one of the wonders of the ancient world - the Aqua Augusta. Raksha also climbs into the crater of Vesuvius to uncover what could have been happening inside the volcano in the fateful moments before the eruption(n)

programme.title: The Missing Evidence
programme.desc: Documentary Investigating some of the world's most notorious conspiracy theories. The release of the official conclusions as to why the World Trade Centre's twin towers collapsed after the 9/11 attacks in 2001 left many unsatisfied, with video footage of molten metal pouring from the damaged floors and eyewitness reports of explosions not addressed fully and leading to talk of conspiracies. This programme looks at the theory of chemist Frank Greening and metallurgist Christian Simensen, who believe that the 30 tons of aluminum alloys from the two planes themselves are behind these unexplained occurrences(n)

programme.desc: The observational documentary series exploring the lives of British ex-pats in Benidorm continues, as businesswoman Vikki decides to tempt her UK-based clients into embracing the Spanish lifestyle more vigorously with a 'Spanish Day' at her salon. Meanwhile, a bad break-up for 21-year-old Ben, who runs the resort's only British-owned mobility scooter business, prompts his dad Mick to fly in to provide some much-needed perspective. Plus, the show provides an insight into the world of twin sisters Catherine and Patricia, expert scrimpers who keep meticulous records of their expenditure, once managing to drop their weekly outlay to just one euro(n)

programme.desc: How former Wigan pub landladies Jill and Maria have successfully swapped their lifestyles after buying a caravan for £300 and moving to Benidorm, where Jill works as a singer and Maria researches family trees online. The programme also follows mum-of-five Michelle and her Spanish husband Paco as they struggle to cope following the closure of their campsite business, and Wayne, Des and Paul aim to raise thousands for charity by producing the resort's first naked calendar(n)

programme.title: Bargain-Loving Brits in the Sun
programme.desc: Drag artist James - aka Dusty Crack - wants to update his Amy Winehouse outfit, but money is tight as he has seen his earnings go down from 100 euros a gig to sometimes as little as 30. Paul and Jacqui run a bar that charges significantly more than other local establishments, but attract customers by offering bingo, quiz nights and British food, while retired Middlesbrough couple Eddie and Pauline are living on a strict budget at Villamar, Benidorm's largest campsite, where they regard their pitch opposite the campsite bins as a bonus(n)

programme.title: Inside
programme.desc: Behind the scenes of the confectionery company, telling the story of a business that started out making cocoa and drinking chocolate almost 200 years ago, eventually evolving into one of the most famous chocolate brands in the world. But over the past 150 years the company has been rocked by scandal, including a salmonella scare and a hostile takeover bid. This documentary looks at the good and the bad times for Cadbury(n)

programme.title: When... Goes Horribly Wrong
programme.desc: When holidays go right they offer much-needed rest and relaxation in the lap of luxury. However, those same vacations can just as easily end in disaster. Examples include chartered accountant Bill and his wife Tanya, who spent £11,000 on a once-in-a-lifetime cruise to the Bahamas, only to end up trapped in the eye of a cyclone. Iain and Judie's luxury dream trip to Vegas turned into deadly nightmare when they were caught up in the now infamous shootings in October 2017 in which 58 people were killed. Contributors include Danni Menzies, Scarlette Douglas and Simon Calder. Narrated by Glynis Barber(n)

programme.title: Autopsy
